claim_text: Insider trading is punishable by up to 20 years in prison under the Securities Exchange Act.
source_sentence: Under the Securities Exchange Act, insider trading is punishable by up to 20 years in prison. Additionally, individuals may face fines of up to $5 million, while corporations can be fined up to $25 million.
reason: Separated because it contains two independently verifiable facts.
